title: Pellegrinia pubiflora
taxonomy: Pellegrinia pubiflora is a species of plant within the family Sapotaceae. It is native to the tropical forests of West Africa. The classification of this plant places it in the kingdom Plantae, and more specifically in the order Ebenales. Pellegrinia pubiflora is a type of evergreen tree characterized by its small flowers and pubescent leaves. This classification reflects its unique characteristics and evolutionary relationships within the plant kingdom.
